title: EE33's Clientside Modpack
description:
Personal modpack made for playing on an SMP server.

Contains performance, enhancements and aesthetic improvements!
body:
# Awesome features!

- Minimap for adventure
- Advanced written book and sign editor
- Show ping in milliseconds, not bars
- Super cool sounds
- Shaders and dynamic lighting
- Far distance rendering for servers
- Better quality screenshots
- Dark loading screen
- Survival spectator mode
- Not report chat to Microsoft
- Make and use schematics with Litematica
- 3d skins
- More particles, like fireflies and waves
- Customizied GUIs
- Rotate builds in creative
- Speech bubbles for chat
- Join different server versions

## Contents

This modpack attempts to combine multiple popular existing performance enhancing modpacks with some personal favorites.

See particular version for modlist. Modpack changes slightly with each update, with new interesting mods being added and dysfunctional ones being removed.


# May crash, sometimes.
After trying and failing to add more mods, I upload a version that works! It's usually pretty stable when playing. Crashes happen when mods conflict or too many resources are being used.

# Why does this pack exist?

I created this to make it easier to install all the mods I like playing with. Maybe you'll find some mods here that you'd like!

I wanted to use Quilt, but QSL did not update as frequently. Some versions do not use Quilt. I also needed support for the version that vanilla servers usually are on.

For those who are already using a working modpack, this is intended to be used as a reference modlist.

**This modpack is created for adventure, building, asethetics. Also for trackpad.**

---


## Warnings, read carefully:

On certain strict servers these mods CAN be considered hacks or cheats because they extend vanilla movement, controls, crafting and rendering. 

However, on most SMP servers this modpack would be completely fine because
1. It does not provide PVP enhancements, faster movement.
2. It does not have automate gameplay or duplicate items.
3. X-ray is NOT included in the modpack.

### Certain mods are edge cases and require your review:

Autoswitch gives a unfair advantage in games where you swap tools. It is intended to be used as a utility when mining only (and save low durability tools).

Stendhal allows copy pasting books and signs.

Minimap can be set to show caves (not ores).

Tweakaroo can be used for fullbright and unlimited freecam, but it is not enabled by default.
